name: bp-statistical-review-world-energy
title: BP Statistical Review of World Energy
description: Annual flagship energy statistics covering production, consumption, and prices by country and fuel type, drawn from the BP Statistical Review of World Energy 2020 edition (data through 2019). Covers oil, gas, coal, nuclear, hydro, and renewables across 60+ countries and regions, with price series for crude oil, natural gas, and coal going back to the 1970s–80s.

licenses.name: other
licenses.title: BP Statistical Review — free to use with attribution

sources.name: BP Statistical Review of World Energy 2020
sources.title: BP Statistical Review of World Energy 2020 (69th edition) — data through 2019

resources.name: primary-energy-consumption
resources.description: Total primary energy consumption by country and year, 1965–2019. Includes all energy sources. Long format: one row per country per year.

fields.name: country
fields.description: Country or regional aggregate (e.g. Total North America, Total World)

resources.name: oil-production
resources.description: Crude oil and NGL production by country and year, 1965–2019. Long format: one row per country per year.

fields.name: production_kbbl_day
fields.description: Oil production in thousands of barrels per day

resources.name: oil-consumption
resources.description: Oil consumption by country and year, 1965–2019. Long format: one row per country per year.

fields.name: consumption_kbbl_day
fields.description: Oil consumption in thousands of barrels per day

resources.name: gas-production
resources.description: Natural gas production by country and year, 1970–2019. Long format: one row per country per year.

fields.name: production_bcm
fields.description: Natural gas production in billion cubic metres (Bcm)

resources.name: gas-consumption
resources.description: Natural gas consumption by country and year, 1965–2019. Long format: one row per country per year.

fields.name: consumption_bcm
fields.description: Natural gas consumption in billion cubic metres (Bcm)

resources.name: coal-production
resources.description: Coal production by country and year, 1981–2019. Long format: one row per country per year.

resources.name: coal-consumption
resources.description: Coal consumption by country and year, 1965–2019. Long format: one row per country per year.

resources.name: nuclear-generation
resources.description: Nuclear electricity generation by country and year, 1965–2019. Long format: one row per country per year.

resources.name: hydro-generation
resources.description: Hydroelectric power generation by country and year, 1965–2019. Long format: one row per country per year.

resources.name: renewables-consumption
resources.description: Renewables (wind, solar, geothermal, biomass, other) energy consumption by country and year, 1965–2019. Excludes hydro. Long format: one row per country per year.

resources.name: co2-emissions
resources.description: Carbon dioxide emissions from energy use by country and year, 1965–2019. Long format: one row per country per year.

fields.name: emissions_mt_co2
fields.description: CO₂ emissions from energy use in million tonnes of CO₂

resources.name: oil-spot-prices
resources.description: Annual average spot prices for key crude oil benchmarks, 1972–2019. Includes Dubai, Brent, Nigerian Forcados, and West Texas Intermediate (WTI).

fields.name: dubai_usd_bbl
fields.description: Dubai crude spot price (USD per barrel)

fields.name: brent_usd_bbl
fields.description: Brent crude spot price (USD per barrel)

fields.name: nigerian_forcados_usd_bbl
fields.description: Nigerian Forcados crude spot price (USD per barrel)

fields.name: wti_usd_bbl
fields.description: West Texas Intermediate (WTI) crude spot price (USD per barrel)

resources.name: gas-prices
resources.description: Annual average natural gas prices at key international hubs, 1984–2019. Includes Japan LNG CIF, Japan Korea Marker (JKM), German import price, UK NBP, Netherlands TTF, and US Henry Hub.

fields.name: lng_japan_cif_usd_mmbtu
fields.description: Japan LNG CIF price (USD per million Btu)

fields.name: jkm_usd_mmbtu
fields.description: Japan Korea Marker (JKM) price (USD per million Btu)

fields.name: german_import_usd_mmbtu
fields.description: Average German import natural gas price (USD per million Btu)

fields.name: uk_nbp_usd_mmbtu
fields.description: UK NBP (National Balancing Point) gas price (USD per million Btu)

fields.name: netherlands_ttf_usd_mmbtu
fields.description: Netherlands TTF gas hub price (USD per million Btu)

fields.name: henry_hub_usd_mmbtu
fields.description: US Henry Hub natural gas price (USD per million Btu)

resources.name: coal-prices
resources.description: Annual average coal prices at key international markets, 1987–2019. Includes Northwest Europe marker, US Appalachian, Japan steam CIF, China Qinhuangdao, and Japan coking coal CIF.

fields.name: northwest_europe_usd_tonne
fields.description: Northwest Europe steam coal marker price (USD per tonne)

fields.name: us_appalachian_usd_tonne
fields.description: US Central Appalachian coal spot price index (USD per tonne)

fields.name: japan_steam_cif_usd_tonne
fields.description: Japan steam coal spot CIF price (USD per tonne)

fields.name: china_qinhuangdao_usd_tonne
fields.description: China Qinhuangdao steam coal spot price (USD per tonne)

fields.name: japan_coking_cif_usd_tonne
fields.description: Japan coking coal import CIF price (USD per tonne)
